tests.title: Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Platform Availability: 2-service equal-weight composite (99.9% target)
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Checkout Flow: 4-service weighted composite (critical path heavier)
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Multi-Region: grouped SLO members with instanceId per region
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Microservices Mesh: 10-service composite with diverse weights
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Data Pipeline: 3-stage pipeline with increasing weights
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Infrastructure: equal-weight for core infrastructure services
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Mobile Backend: API + Push + Analytics with tiered weights
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Customer Tier: per-customer-tier grouped SLO instances
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Disabled Composite: created in disabled state
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Lenient Composite: low target (90%) for development environment
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Heavily Skewed Weights: one dominant member
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Maximum Members (25): large composite representing a full service catalog
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples No Tags: composite SLO with empty tags array
Composite SLO - Diverse Examples Mixed grouped and ungrouped members
Composite SLO Compute Engine - GET Summary returns NO_DATA summary when all member SLOs are nonexistent
Composite SLO Compute Engine - GET Summary returns correct summary shape for a 2-member composite with equal weights
Composite SLO Compute Engine - GET Summary returns correct summary shape for a composite with varying weights
Composite SLO Compute Engine - GET Summary returns correct summary shape for a composite with 5 members
Composite SLO Compute Engine - GET Summary returns correct summary shape for a composite with 25 members (max)
Composite SLO Compute Engine - GET Summary returns correct summary for a composite with members having instanceId
Composite SLO Compute Engine - GET Summary returns the same status across consecutive GETs (idempotent)
Composite SLO Compute Engine - GET Summary NO_DATA burn rates are all zero
Composite SLO Compute Engine - GET Summary NO_DATA errorBudget has initial=0 and consumed=0
Composite SLO Compute Engine - GET Summary returns definition fields alongside summary in the GET response
Composite SLO Lifecycle full CRUD lifecycle: create → get → update → get → delete → verify gone
Composite SLO Lifecycle create multiple composites and verify they are all findable
Composite SLO Lifecycle update → find flow: updated fields appear in search results
Composite SLO Lifecycle disable → re-enable flow
Composite SLO Lifecycle progressive member growth: start with 2, expand to 5, then to 10
Composite SLO Lifecycle evolving objective: tighten target over time
Composite SLO Lifecycle batch operations: create several, find all, delete all, verify empty
Composite SLO Lifecycle tag management: add, replace, and clear tags through updates
Composite SLO Lifecycle custom ID lifecycle: create with custom ID → get → update → delete → recreate
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with required fields
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with a custom id
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with enabled=false
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with empty tags
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with exactly 2 members (minimum)
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with exactly 25 members (maximum)
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with members that have instanceId
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with large weights
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with multiple tags
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with a stringent objective (99.99%)
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with a lenient objective (90%)
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with a 30d time window
Create Composite SLOs creates a composite SLO with a 90d time window
Create Composite SLOs returns 409 when creating with a duplicate custom id
Create Composite SLOs returns 400 when fewer than 2 members are provided
Create Composite SLOs returns 400 when members array is empty
Create Composite SLOs returns 400 when more than 25 members are provided
Create Composite SLOs returns 400 when a member has a non-positive weight
Create Composite SLOs returns 400 when a member has a negative weight
Create Composite SLOs returns 400 when a member has a non-integer weight
Create Composite SLOs auto-generates an id when none is provided
Create Composite SLOs defaults enabled to true when not specified
Create Composite SLOs sets version to 1 on creation
Create Composite SLOs sets createdAt and updatedAt timestamps on creation
Create Composite SLOs preserves member ordering in the response
Delete Composite SLOs deletes a composite SLO
Delete Composite SLOs returns 404 when deleting a non-existent composite SLO
Delete Composite SLOs only deletes the targeted composite SLO
Delete Composite SLOs returns 404 on double-delete of the same composite SLO
Delete Composite SLOs decreases total count after deletion
Delete Composite SLOs deleted composite SLO no longer appears in search results
Delete Composite SLOs can recreate a composite SLO with the same custom id after deletion
Find Composite SLOs returns all composite SLOs with default pagination
Find Composite SLOs paginates results
Find Composite SLOs filters by a single tag
Find Composite SLOs filters by multiple comma-separated tags
Find Composite SLOs searches by name
Find Composite SLOs searches by partial name match
Find Composite SLOs sorts by name ascending
Find Composite SLOs sorts by name descending
Find Composite SLOs sorts by createdAt descending by default
Find Composite SLOs sorts by createdAt ascending
Find Composite SLOs combines search and tag filters
Find Composite SLOs combines pagination with sorting
Find Composite SLOs returns empty results when no composites match search
Find Composite SLOs returns empty results when no composites match tag filter
Find Composite SLOs returns empty results for page beyond available data
Find Composite SLOs each result includes the full composite SLO definition shape
Find Composite SLOs preserves perPage=1 across multiple pages
Get Composite SLO retrieves a composite SLO by id
Get Composite SLO returns 404 for a non-existent composite SLO
Get Composite SLO returns the composite SLO summary structure with sliValue, errorBudget, status, and burn rates
Get Composite SLO returns NO_DATA status when member SLOs do not exist
Get Composite SLO returns errorBudget structure with initial, consumed, remaining, and isEstimated fields
Get Composite SLO returns members array as member summaries when retrieving by id
Get Composite SLO returns all definition fields in the get response
Get Composite SLO returns the same data after create and subsequent get

Update Composite SLOs updates the members of a composite SLO
Update Composite SLOs updates tags and objective
Update Composite SLOs updates the enabled flag
Update Composite SLOs updates the time window
Update Composite SLOs updates multiple fields simultaneously
Update Composite SLOs updates updatedAt timestamp after modification
Update Composite SLOs preserves createdAt after update
Update Composite SLOs update to members with instanceId
Update Composite SLOs update to maximum 25 members
Update Composite SLOs subsequent get reflects the update

Update Composite SLOs returns 400 when updating members to fewer than 2
Update Composite SLOs returns 400 when updating members to more than 25
